name: Paul Bunyan Ski Hill
description: Paul Bunyan Ski Hill is a classic old school Midwest ski resort where families gather for authentic Midwest skiing in Lakewood, Wisconsin. Pine trees, fresh snow, and small-town charm create a nostalgic skiing experience. With diverse terrain that skis bigger than it is and a vintage 1967 Hall T-Bar, the hill proudly preserves the traditional feel of skiing’s earlier days.
